task_text: Draft a status update email to Meridian Group summarizing where Project Helios stands this week. Tone should be professional and reassuring. Save the draft as meridian_status_email_draft.txt.

input.content:
Subject: Project Helios Weekly Status Update

Dear Meridian Group Team,

I hope you are doing well. I wanted to share a brief status update on Project Helios for this week.

Overall, the project remains on track, with steady progress being made across the key workstreams. The team continues to focus on the current priorities, address open items promptly, and maintain alignment on upcoming milestones.

This week’s highlights include:
- Progress continued on [key workstream or deliverable].
- The team advanced [specific task, review, implementation, or decision].
- Open questions around [topic] are being monitored and addressed through the appropriate channels.

At this stage, there are no major concerns requiring escalation. Any outstanding items are being actively managed, and we will continue to keep the Meridian Group team informed as the project moves forward.

Next steps for the coming week include:
- Completing [upcoming deliverable or milestone].
- Continuing coordination on [workstream or dependency].
- Providing any needed updates or decisions related to [topic].

Thank you for your continued partnership and engagement. We remain confident in the current direction of Project Helios and will share further updates as progress continues.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
